notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Mauricio Dubón out at 2nd. Austin Riley out at 1st.
